flags.label: Delaware State University · In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Delaware State University rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.4k → $10.7k).

flags.label: Margaret H Rollins School of Nursing at Beebe Medical Center · Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Margaret H Rollins School of Nursing at Beebe Medical Center fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (67 → 51).

flags.label: Delaware College of Art and Design · In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Delaware College of Art and Design rose 24% between 2006 and 2009 ($15.2k → $18.8k).

flags.label: Delaware College of Art and Design · Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Delaware College of Art and Design rose 24% between 2006 and 2009 ($15.2k → $18.8k).

flags.label: Academy of Massage and Bodywork · Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Academy of Massage and Bodywork fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (106 → 81).

flags.label: Dawn Career Institute LLC · 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 22 pp at Dawn Career Institute LLC vs the 2003–2007 baseline (69.1% vs 90.8%).

flags.label: Delaware Technical Community College-Terry · Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Delaware Technical Community College-Terry rose 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.9k → $10.5k).

flags.label: Goldey-Beacom College · In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Goldey-Beacom College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.8k → $14.9k).
